spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15 for cleaner syntax.
spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/main/java.before: return String.format("Student [id=%s, name=%s, passportNumber=%s]", id, name, passportNumber);

spring-boot-2-jdbc-with-h2/src/test/java.general_idea: Remove deprecated @ExtendWith(SpringExtension.class) annotation as Spring Boot 3.x integrates JUnit 5 natively.
Remove unused import for the deprecated SpringExtension class.
Remove unused import for the deprecated ExtendWith annotation.
